## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up for the Pod team to discuss ongoing projects, engineering requests, and upcoming vacations.](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engineering is now prioritizing requests with broader applicability across clients](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Octave integration for Strapi has been declined by engineering](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Nika is preparing for vacation, with Suleiman handling publishing in her absence](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [DataGrid Q3 content has one month left before SOW rework](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

  - [Workflow fixes are still acceptable, but enhancements/new requests face scrutiny](https://fathom.video/share/5vJqfJGN5bYPbt48ZKDVoWGf-Um4Msf6?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
